title: Xtra Creamy Venezuelan Chicken Empanadas
description: A floral and creamy Venezuelan dish perfect for a date night, featuring egg wash and dashi extract, and friendly to dairy free diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through.
In a large bowl, whisk together the non-dairy milk, dashi extract, cumin, and paprika.
Add the cooked chicken to the bowl and stir until the chicken is well coated with the creamy mixture.
Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Use a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass to cut out circles of dough.
Place a tablespoon of the chicken mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with the egg wash and fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape.
Press the edges of the dough together to seal the empanada.
